positive: A stylized, highly graphic illustration of a cosmic wanderer: a friendly, retro-futuristic robot companion resting on a glowing crescent moon, looking out over a bioluminescent nebula. The robot has gentle curves, oversized lenses, and is rendered in clean, cel-shaded vector art with crisp black outlines. The background nebula should feature deep purples, electric blues, and pops of cyan light, contrasted with solid black space. Composition must be centered, emphasizing the silhouette and primary subjects. Style: Vaporwave meets Art Deco illustration, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Composition: Flat lay, high contrast, symmetrical balance. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, glowing sources within the nebula. Aspect Ratio: Square.
negative: text, typography, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, noisy, blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photography, gradients (unless intended as nebula glow), grain
